name: Masked Singer Sverige
overview: Join us as twelve well-known people take part in one of the world's most spectacular singing competitions. Their identity is kept secret behind fabulous masks and it is up to our expert panel to figure out who is hiding behind the creations.

trailers.title: David Hellenius får oväntat besök i badrummet - Masked Singer Sverige
